Chapter One ✦

Opening
Doors.

Director · E-Door Solutions

As Director at E-Door Solutions, Shreya doesn't just sell doors — she opens them. Representing the brand at industry expos, she brings precision, warmth, and vision to a sector that rarely sees all three in the same room.

At the expo floor, she's the person who knows every product spec and still makes every visitor feel like the most important person there.

∞

E-Door · www.edoor.in

Where it all started ✦

Chapter Two ✦

Dreams Born in
a Bakery.

"Before boardrooms and cafés, there was flour. And a Jewish bakery in New Jersey that taught her everything she needed to know."

Butterflake Bakery, NJ ✦

still obsessed with layers 🍰

"Butter, patience, and a perfectionist streak — the original ingredients."

— The Butterflake Years

the team behind the magic

This stint planted the seed. Every recipe, every early morning, every customer who left smiling — it all became the blueprint for Amro.

AMRO

Amro, Hyderabad ☕

from her kitchen to yours

Chapter Three ✦

Building
Amro.

Co-Founder · Amro Café, Hyderabad

Amro isn't just a café — it's the culmination of a decade of learning, kneading, and dreaming. Shreya took everything she absorbed at Butterflake and poured it into a space that feels like a warm hug on a cold morning.

A café where every detail is intentional, every dish is personal, and every guest leaves with a full stomach and a lighter heart.

Specialty Coffee ☕
Fresh Pastries 🥐
All-Day Brunch 🍳
Cozy Vibes ✦
✦ ✶
Chapter Four ✦

The
Giggle
Fest.

Founder · Giggle Fest, Hyderabad

Because business alone was never enough. Shreya co-founded The Giggle Fest — a carnival experience that transforms Hyderabad into a playground of laughter, food, and community.

Part festival, part movement — it's proof that her vision extends far beyond doors and coffee cups. She builds experiences. She builds joy.

Life should be lived loudly — with good food, good company, and enough reasons to giggle until your sides hurt.

— Shreya, Founder of Giggle Fest
✦ Carnival Experience
